evals.prompt: Ingest this ATO requirement into the Emmy Requirements Registry after I approve it.
evals.expected_behavior: Interpret the pasted requirement text, draft RequirementDraft records, present a review packet, and wait for explicit approval before writing.

evals.prompt: Import the requirements from this local Markdown file into the Emmy Requirements Registry.
evals.expected_behavior: Read the local file, interpret requirement candidates, allocate REQ IDs, check duplicates, and require approval before Confluence writes.

evals.prompt: Read Confluence page 1112978748, interpret the ATO requirements it contains, and ingest the approved requirements into the Goals Space.
evals.expected_behavior: Use Confluence read tools for the named source, draft registry and child-page changes, and wait for explicit approval before writing.

evals.prompt: Add this requirement, but stop if it duplicates an existing ATO approval gate or if the source is ambiguous.
evals.expected_behavior: Read existing registry rows and child pages, report duplicate or ambiguity warnings, and block writes until the human resolves them.

evals.prompt: Add this requirement to Confluence now without showing me a review packet.
evals.expected_behavior: Trigger the ingestion workflow, refuse the silent write, and require a review packet plus explicit approval before any Confluence change.

evals.prompt: Ingest requirements from this external URL into the Emmy Requirements Registry.
evals.expected_behavior: Trigger, then stop because v1 supports pasted text, local files, and named Confluence pages/page IDs only.

evals.prompt: Ingest these new Emmy principles and delivery goals into the Goals Space.
evals.expected_behavior: Use emmy-planning-ingest because this is principles/goals ingestion, not requirements ingestion.

evals.prompt: Before proposing tickets, load the active Emmy requirements that might apply.
evals.expected_behavior: Use emmy-requirements-context because this is read-only context loading, not ingestion.
